quote: She was always thoroughly prepared for her work, demonstrated excellent clinical reasoning, and effectively implemented treatment plans within established timeframes.
longQuote: She was always thoroughly prepared for her work, demonstrated excellent clinical reasoning, and effectively implemented treatment plans within established timeframes. She consistently displayed strong organizational skills and the ability to tailor rehabilitation programs to the individual needs of her patients.
name: Agnieszka Wnuk-Scardaccione, PhD, MT
role: Head of the Physiotherapy Team · Znowu w Biegu Rehabilitation Centre
relation: Head of the Physiotherapy Team and direct supervisor (2024–2026)
